name: be quiet! PURE BASE 501 Airflow White Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case - 2x Preinstalled Pure Wings 3 140mm PWM fans - Rotatable PCIe Slots - USB 3.2 Gen. 2 Type-C (BG075)
shortName: be quiet! PURE BASE 501 Airflow White Mid-Tower ATX Computer Case
description: A mid-tower ATX case with white airflow design and pre-installed PWM fans, featuring rotatable PCIe slots for flexible component mounting.
